title: Milestone approved but unpaid
summary: Worker says milestone was approved, employer says payment rail delayed.
resolution: Escrow released after rail confirmation and both parties notified.

title: Unsafe site conditions reported
summary: Worker reported missing PPE and unsafe scaffold setup.
resolution: Work paused; employer corrected safety violations before restart.

title: Scope creep without change order
summary: Employer added extra tasks outside original milestone scope.
resolution: Change order issued with revised timeline and compensation.
